{{Infobox character
| name = Mu Enkai
| aliases = Enkai
| abilities = {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|fire Path, fireball technique}}
| titles = {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Lowgold]]}}
| professions = {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|servant}}
| appears_in = Cradle
| introduced = [[Ghostwater (novel)|Ghostwater]]
}}

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|Mu Enkai, also known as Enkai, is a man whose status and ambition were fundamentally transformed by the discovery of a mysterious egg. This object, which contains a concentrated blood [[aura]], has granted him immense power and physical durability, making his body as tough as stone and leather. Through the egg, he has risen to a position of authority where even Highgolds representing various [[Paths]] bow to him. Enkai utilizes [[Striker techniques]], specifically conjuring fireballs that resemble bleeding red flames, by drawing power from the egg into his soul. Despite his newfound strength and pride, he is prone to intense emotions such as rage and shame. During a confrontation with a [[Skysworn]] servant, Enkai's aggression led to a violent exchange where he used his [[madra]] to attack. Ultimately, his [[life]] ended abruptly when he was struck by a black bar of fire, leaving nothing behind but ashes.}}

== Ghostwater ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|Born as a servant, Mu Enkai originally followed a fire [[Path]] to operate a furnace. Having previously been a [[Lowgold]], he now carries a [[Goldsign]] on the back of his hand consisting of a shifting flame pattern stained red like blood. Due to the influence of the egg, his fireball technique has evolved into a true weapon. Throughout his journey, Enkai harbors a deep hatred for the [[Skysworn]].}}

<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">6</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Mu Enkai]] was born a servant who followed a fire [[Path]] to operate a furnace.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c1">''Ghostwater'', chapter 1</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Mu Enkai]] was previously a [[Lowgold]].<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c1" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Mu Enkai]]'s [[Goldsign]] is a shifting flame pattern on the back of his hand that has been stained red as blood.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c1" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|Enkai's fireball technique has evolved into a true weapon due to the egg.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c1" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|Enkai is a character who harbors hatred for the [[Skysworn]].<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c1" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Mu Enkai]] is the full name of Enkai.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c1" />}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Ghostwater]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
[[Category:Titled characters]]
[[Category:Viewpoint characters]]
